pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicit instructions and verifier.py checks

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a fully synthetic dataset simulating the Iowa Gambling Task (IGT), generated by a Python script within setup_task.sh. It explicitly injects a contaminated participant 'sub-999' configured with a non-exploratory strategy (always choosing Deck A) as expected by the verifier logic. The required output location is verified to be '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/igt_report.json'.
